title: DataContractRules
description: Structured data contract rules emitted by gen-sdk-distill.py. Single-source of truth for AST validator (Track H) derived_from field. Two rule origins: (i) data layer = from COMMON_DATA_CONTRACT in distiller, (ii) HTTP/auth = from conformance/systemic-contracts.json contract.id. Rules without derived_from cause build failure.

id.description: Unique rule id (kebab-case). AST validator loads rules by this id.

rule_kind.description: pushable_filter: filter combinator restrictions; cursor: pagination method restrictions; where_required: mandatory filter rules; forbidden_call: call patterns the SDK rejects at runtime; boundary: schema/DDL boundary contracts.

applies_lang.description: Languages this rule applies to. Use ['*'] for all languages.

pattern_hint.description: Regex pattern hint for AST validator static detection. May be refined per-language in the validator.

derived_from.description: REQUIRED. Reference to the rule origin: 'COMMON_DATA_CONTRACT§<section>' for data rules, or the contract.id from systemic-contracts.json for HTTP/auth rules. Build fails if absent.

pack_section.description: Pack section this rule appears in (e.g. '§6', '§5')

lock_sha.description: route_surface_sha from PINNED_SDK.lock.json at generation time

advisory_only.description: If true, this rule is advisory-only (warn, never block). Rules that are statically undecidable (e.g. owner-scoped check) MUST be advisory_only=true and never graduate to block.

advisory_reason.description: Required when advisory_only=true. Explains why static analysis cannot determine a block verdict.
